parameters.name: StatusPill
parameters.description: PackML / pipeline state indicator pill. The state value is appended as a CSS class (e.g. status-pill--RUNNING) for color coding via CSS custom properties.

state.description: IDLE | STARTING | EXECUTE | RUNNING | HELD | HOLDING | UNHOLDING | SUSPENDING | UNSUSPENDING | STOPPING | STOPPED | ABORTING | ABORTED | COMPLETE | RESETTING

label.description: Override display text; defaults to state value
